onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Group treasury, finally simple and transparent.
onboarding.welcomeBody: Create a pot, invite your members. Every withdrawal must be approved by the creator — no more unjustified expenses.
onboarding.howItWorksBody: To receive withdrawals, connect your IBAN in 1 minute from your profile. Funds arrive directly to your account.
onboarding.connectBankBody: To receive withdrawals, connect your IBAN in 1 minute from your profile. Funds arrive directly to your account.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: Where does my money go when I add funds?
faq.a1: When you add money to a pot, it is held securely by Stripe, a global payments platform trusted by companies like Apple, Uber and Amazon. Your funds are protected and only accessible through Monto.
faq.a2: The pot creator can withdraw funds at any time. Depending on the pot settings, members can also request withdrawals which the creator approves or rejects. Once approved, the money is sent directly to the creator's connected bank account, usually within 1–5 business days.
faq.a3: Monto charges no fees. Standard card processing fees of 1.5% + €0.25 per transaction are charged by Stripe, our payment provider. A small payout fee of 0.25% + €0.25 applies when withdrawing to a bank account. These are shown clearly before every payment.
faq.a4: Yes. All payments are processed by Stripe, which is PCI DSS compliant and uses bank-level encryption. Monto never stores your card or bank details directly.
faq.q5: How do I connect my bank account?
faq.a5: Go to your Profile page and tap "Payout Account". Follow the steps to enter your details and connect your bank account via our secure onboarding form. You must connect a bank account before you can receive withdrawals.
faq.a6: Yes, you can leave any pot you are a member of at any time. If you are the creator, you can close the pot entirely, which will trigger a final withdrawal of remaining funds.
faq.q7: Who can invite people to a pot?
faq.a7: Both the pot creator and members can share the invite link to bring new people into a pot.
faq.q8: What happens if a withdrawal is rejected?
faq.a8: If the creator rejects a withdrawal request, no money is moved and the requester receives a notification letting them know.

potSettings.title: Pot Settings
potSettings.securityApprovalDesc: Withdrawal requests must be approved by the creator or a leader before funds are released.
potSettings.securityPasswordDesc: Members enter the pot password to withdraw instantly — no approval needed.
potSettings.securityNoneDesc: Withdrawals are processed immediately with no approval and no password.
potSettings.securityReadOnlyApproval: Withdrawals require creator or leader approval
potSettings.receiptDesc: Members must upload proof after withdrawing
potSettings.manageLeadersHint: Manage leaders from the Members tab
potSettings.receiptWarningDesc: Turning off receipt verification means members no longer need to justify withdrawals. Are you sure?
